caption: A man wearing a pink tank top and black athletic shorts is practicing basketball in an indoor gymnasium. The setting features a polished wooden floor with a green circular area, blue wall padding, and blue bleachers in the background. A basketball hoop and backboard are mounted on the wall. In the beginning, the man is positioned on the court, jumping to throw a basketball upward and backward over his head. As the sequence progresses, the ball is seen suspended in mid-air behind him while he lands and begins to move forward. By the end of the clip, the man has caught the ball and is standing still, facing the camera while holding the basketball at waist level. No on-screen text or logos are visible in the scene.
